details.test: Task 1: Request quote for cheapest qualifying DAF (>=50 m³/h, <=$80,000)
Task 2: Assemble basic treatment line and enforce $150,000 budget
Task 3: Select Germany MBR maintenance plan under €6,000/year with ≤24h response
Task 4: Save 2023 food & beverage case study (≥100 m³/day) to reading list
Task 5: Use equalization tank sizing calculator and add recommended tank (or placeholder) to quote list
Task 6: Compare two systems and request quote for one with lower NaOH consumption
Task 7: Find nearest industrial wastewater distributor around ZIP 75201 and view contact details
Task 8: Register for a June session (adapted using case study as webinar resource)
